case_title: ROBERT C HARTMAN et al VS. PHIL TONG - GOLDEN GATE GUNS

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-10-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAY-25-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST ROBERT C HARTMAN FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: SEP-11-2012, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE SEP-28-2012. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING NOV-13-2012 AT 2:00 PM. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-20-2012 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance nor objection. Court ordered case dismissed. Proceedings not reported. (610)

Off Calendar Sep-13-2012 Continued To Nov-13-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff is sanctioned $350.00 for failure to appear. The OSC is reset to NOV-13-2012 at 2:00 PM in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-11-2012 Continued To Sep-11-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff Robert C. Hartman, appearing on his own behalf. The OSC is re-set to 9/11/2012 at 2:00 PM, in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)
